ocr_findings.description: Page number '368' appears at top of cleaned MD (preceding page number artifact from cleaning pass) rather than as a footer, but this is a minor formatting artifact with no meaning impact.

reviewer_notes: Cleaned re-OCR version is high quality. All key terms (フォールトトレラント, フェールソフト, フェールセーフ, フールプルーフ) correctly captured with accurate definitions. The 3-row reliability-terms table is properly structured. Exam-tip callout correctly renders 'コレが出る！' (the cleaned pass fixed the wrong_char present in the raw OCR). Label 'content' is correct.
